creator: cryx-freebsd@h3q.com
text:
Vendor: Tyan
Model: Tomcat h1000S (S3950)
Chipset: Broadcom HT1000 (ServerWorks)
Issues: smbus does not work, SATA needs to work in P-ATA emulation, SATA disks are detected as UDMA33 but work in full speed
